analytic.title: Diverses Reflexions concernant la Physique generale. Second Memoire

biblStruct.note: DanIB WV: Tb. | Quelle: Word-Referenz DanB-Werke_St-Mm1996.docx | Bernoulli Werke: Bd. 5, pp. 631-640. | Rohangabe: Diverses Reflexions concernant la Physique generale. Second Memoire: Acta Helvetica, Physico-Mathematico-Botanico-Medica, vol.II (1755), pp.101-113.
